printed.name: Hip Opener
printed.setup: Lying supine in neutral spine position, legs bent, hips externally rotated, sides of feet placed on pedal, soles of feet pressed together, pedal halfway down, arms by sides, palms down

movement.inhale: Raise legs, lifting pedal, return to start position

cues: Maximize work of hip external rotators
Reach knees out and down toward Mat
Focus on hip extension, minimizing movement in knee joints
